title: kanbusr outputs ANSI color codes in non-interactive mode
description: kanbusr outputs ANSI color codes even when stdout is not a TTY (non-interactive mode). It should automatically detect when output is being piped or redirected and disable colors. Standard Rust crates like 'colored' or 'owo-colors' have auto-detection built in. The --porcelain flag exists as a workaround, but colors should be disabled automatically in non-interactive contexts.
creator: ryan.porter
